implement.scope_selected: wave-1 (as first slice of the full build request)
implement.blocker: Waves 2–10 (~17 engineering-weeks) require fresh /task-implementer invocations with narrower scope — context budget prohibits single-session completion.

hitl_gate.reason: Scope selection for task-implementer — full feature build spans 16–22 engineering-weeks across 86 tasks and 10 waves. Running all of it autonomously is out of scope for a single pipeline invocation.

options.label: Stop here
options.scope: Deliver tasks.md + execution-schedule.json as artifacts. End pipeline.

options.label: Wave 1 only (~1 week, 14 tasks)
options.scope: Infra + Dockerfiles + docker-compose + IaC + CI/CD + 10 ADRs + feature flags module. Exit = green `docker-compose up` locally + hello-world deployed to staging.

options.label: Full build
options.scope: All 86 tasks over 10 waves. NOT recommended in a single invocation — requires multiple HITL checkpoints after waves 1, 5, 7, 10.
